faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Woodlawn, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Woodlawn properties commonly experience pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent in older wooden structures near Woodlawn Cemetery, while pavement ants typically infest driveways and foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to ensure the most effective treatment.
